💌 - siren luka x human user

🪼- I’ll say this once and only once, if you intend to use any of my wlw bots with a male persona, please do not go into my reviews talking about how you did it/changed the scenario to fit it anyways. I make my bots for fun and with a specific idea in mind, I don’t want to hear about how you went against the bot coding and my writing. If you want to, take the details and change the pronouns yourself; just don’t tell me about it and keep the bot private. It’s demotivating and just a touch irritating, now that this has happened twice now. There’s other hyuna bots you can use from other people. The best I can do is block but if I run into more issues, I’ll likely just private my definitions and put stricter coding in them for a female user. Do what you want, but I don’t want to really see it. Or better yet, just make your own bots 😭 I do it for fun! It’s not perfect!

💌 - with that all being said, here goes a siren luka ^_^. Artist is Ryo Ribbit!
